endpoints.name: GET /v1/Schemas/{Id}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific schema with its nested versions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Schemas/{Id}/Versions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a paginated list of versions of the schema.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Schemas/{Id}/Versions/{SchemaVersion}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific schema and version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{SCHEMAVERSION}} with a real schemaversion.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Sinks
endpoints.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Sinks belonging to the account used to make the request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Sinks
endpoints.description: Create a new Sink
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Sinks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Sink.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Sinks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Sink
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Sinks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Sink.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Sinks/{Sid}/Test
endpoints.description: Create a new Sink Test Event for the given Sink.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Sinks/{Sid}/Validate
endpoints.description: Validate that a test event for a Sink was received.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Subscriptions
endpoints.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Subscriptions belonging to the account used to make the request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Subscriptions
endpoints.description: Create a new Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Subscriptions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Subscriptions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Subscriptions/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Subscriptions/{SubscriptionSid}/SubscribedEvents
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Subscribed Event types for a Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONSID}} with a real subscriptionsid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Subscriptions/{SubscriptionSid}/SubscribedEvents
endpoints.description: Create a new Subscribed Event type for the subscription
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONSID}} with a real subscriptionsid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Subscriptions/{SubscriptionSid}/SubscribedEvents/{Type}
endpoints.description: Read an Event for a Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONSID}} with a real subscriptionsid. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Subscriptions/{SubscriptionSid}/SubscribedEvents/{Type}
endpoints.description: Update an Event for a Subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONSID}} with a real subscriptionsid. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Subscriptions/{SubscriptionSid}/SubscribedEvents/{Type}
endpoints.description: Remove an event type from a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONSID}} with a real subscriptionsid. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Types
endpoints.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all the available Event Types.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Types/{Type}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Event Type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type.
